call_transcript: Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? Customer: Good, thanks. Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  Is that something you'd be interested in discussing? Customer: Well, I'm thinking about consolidating some debt. Agent: Excellent! That's a very common use for our loans.  We can definitely help with that. What kind of debt are we looking at? Customer: Credit card debt, mostly. About 8 grand. Agent: Okay, perfect.  So, with the $10,000 Personal Loan at 8.99%, you could pay off that credit card debt and have some extra for, you know, emergencies. The monthly payments would be around $198.  Does that sound manageable? Customer: Hmm, that's… actually pretty good. What are the terms? Agent: It's a 60-month term.  No prepayment penalties.  We can get the paperwork started today if you'd like. Customer: Okay, let's do it.

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah with Financial Freedom. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: Where did you get my number? I didn't ask for this. Agent: Sir, we… uh… we have a list of pre-approved customers. We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 19.99%. Customer: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! Agent: Well, sir, it depends on your credit score… Customer: Look, I'm retired. I don't need another credit card. And frankly, I'm not happy you called me.  Just take me off your list. Agent: Okay, sir. I understand. I'll make a note of that. Have a good day. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Secure Finance. I'm calling regarding a referral from Northwest Credit Union.  They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. Customer: Oh, yeah, I spoke with someone there. I'm looking at renovating my bathroom. Agent: Fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $20,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%.  What's the estimated cost of the renovation? Customer: Around 18,000. Agent: Okay, so a $20,000 loan gives you some wiggle room. The monthly payments would be approximately $375.  We have several term options, from 36 to 72 months. Customer: 72 months sounds good.  What are the fees? Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150.  And, of course, the monthly interest.  We can waive the origination fee if you enroll in autopay. Customer: Hmm, okay. Autopay sounds fine.  So, $375 a month, plus the interest… and no origination fee? Agent: Exactly!  We can get the application started right away.  Do you have your social security number handy?

Agent: Hello Mr. Brown? This is Lisa from Premier Financial. We're offering… Customer: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! Agent: Sir, we… we have a list of potential customers… We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at 17.99%... Customer: (Yelling) I said NO! Stop calling me! This is harassment! I want to be removed from your list *immediately*! *click*

Agent: Hi Maria, this is John calling from Capital Solutions. I see you submitted a request for a personal loan on our website. How are you today? Customer: Oh, hello. I'm doing alright. I'm thinking about consolidating some medical bills. Agent: I understand. That's a great use for a personal loan. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 9.49%.  Could you tell me a little more about the medical bills? Customer: It's about $12,000, spread across a few different hospitals. The interest rates are… well, they're high. Agent: Absolutely. Our 9.49% rate could save you a significant amount of money. The monthly payments would be around $285. We offer terms from 36 to 60 months. Customer: Hmm, that sounds… reasonable. What's the catch? Agent: No catch! Just a standard credit check. We also have a small application fee of $75.  Would you like me to send you an application link? Customer: Yes, please. Send it to my email address. Agent: Wonderful! I'll send that over right away.  We'll be in touch to answer any questions you have.

Agent: Hello Mr. Lee? This is Emily with First Choice Credit. We're offering a… Customer: (Interrupting) I'm unemployed. I don't want a credit card.  Where did you get my number? Agent: Sir, we are pre-approving you for a $1,000 Signature Credit Card at 24.99%... Customer: (Scoffs) Seriously? You think I can afford that?  Don't bother me again. *click*

Agent: Good evening, Ms. Garcia, this is Kevin from Global Finance. I'm calling regarding a referral from your financial advisor at Horizon Investments. They mentioned you were considering a home improvement project. Customer: Yes, that's right. We're planning to remodel our kitchen. Agent: Excellent! We are pre-approving you for a $30,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 6.99%.  That's a fantastic rate, especially given the current market. What's the estimated cost of the remodel? Customer: We're looking at around $25,000, maybe a little more. Agent: Perfect. So, a $30,000 loan gives you some flexibility. We have terms ranging from 60 to 120 months.  The monthly payments would be approximately $300. Customer: That sounds good. What are the fees involved? Agent: There's a $200 application fee, and a $300 early repayment fee if you pay off the loan within the first 24 months. We also offer a discount on the application fee if you provide proof of homeowner's insurance. Customer: Okay, I can do that. What about the interest rate? Is that fixed or variable? Agent: It's a fixed rate for the entire loan term, so your payments will remain consistent. We also offer a rate match guarantee – if you find a lower rate elsewhere, we'll match it. Customer: That's reassuring.  I think I'm ready to move forward. Agent: Wonderful! Let's get the application started. I'll need your social security number and date of birth...

Agent: Hello Mr. Wilson? This is Susan from Advantage Financial. We're offering a… Customer: (Slowly) Hello? What was that? Speak up, please. Agent: I said, we're offering a Signature Credit Card. We are pre-approving you for a $500 Signature Credit Card at 21.99%... Customer: 21.99…? What does that even *mean*? Is that a lot? I don't understand. Agent: It's the interest rate, sir. It's the cost of borrowing money. Customer: Borrowing… Oh dear. I don't think I need any borrowing. Thank you. *click*

Agent: Hi Ashley, this is Brian from Premier Lending. I see you recently requested information about a personal loan on our website. How are you doing this evening? Customer: Good, thanks. I'm looking to consolidate some student loan debt. Agent: Excellent! That's a smart move. We are pre-approving you for a $40,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 5.99%. That's one of the lowest rates we've ever offered. How much student loan debt are we talking about? Customer: Around $35,000. Agent: Okay, so a $40,000 loan would cover that and give you a little extra for, you know, emergencies. The monthly payments would be around $550. We have terms from 60 to 180 months. Customer: 180 months sounds good. What are the fees? Agent: There's a $250 application fee, and a $400 early repayment fee if you pay off the loan within the first 36 months. We also offer a 0.25% rate discount if you set up automatic payments. Customer: Hmm, okay. So, $550 a month, plus the fees… and the discount for autopay? Agent: Exactly! And remember, that 5.99% rate is fixed for the entire loan term. We also offer a free financial consultation to help you manage your debt. Customer: That sounds great. I'd like to learn more about the consultation. Agent: Absolutely! I can schedule that for you right now. Let's start with the application...

Agent: Hello Mr. Thompson? This is Lisa from Secure Credit. We're offering a… Customer: (Interrupting) Where did you get my number? I never asked for this. Agent: Sir, we are pre-approving you for a $1,500 Signature Credit Card at 18.49%... Customer: No, thank you. *click*
